name: Dev Browser
description: A Claude Code skill that gives agents the ability to control a web browser for testing and verifying work during development. Uses Playwright for browser automation with persistent pages, LLM-friendly DOM snapshots, and optional Chrome extension support for accessing existing browser sessions.

findings_summary.notes: Well-maintained individual repo by SawyerHood. TypeScript codebase with Playwright browser automation. Has LICENSE (MIT), CONTRIBUTING.md, CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml), pre-commit hooks via Husky, and a test suite in the extension directory. The skill is properly structured under skills/dev-browser/. Active development: last pushed Jan 2025 with 3,675 stars. Missing SECURITY.md is the primary gap. No dangerous patterns detected. Browser automation is scoped to developer testing use-cases. Installable via Claude Code marketplace.
